title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 262.650 - Organization — officers — membership
text:
262.650.  Organization — officers — membership. — Before any one of the aforesaid organizations can take advantage of sections 262.630 to 262.660, it shall be duly organized with a president, a secretary, a treasurer, an executive board consisting of not less than three members, and a signed membership of not less than twenty-five farmers.
(RSMo 1939 § 14317) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12659; 1919 § 12149
